name: the toolchain installer --permissive-only skips the GPL/LGPL tools
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runners/install-toolchain.sh" --verify --permissive-only 2>e.txt; grep -q 'tool=semgrep license=LGPL-2.1 status=skipped' e.txt && grep -q 'tool=hadolint license=GPL-3.0 status=skipped' e.txt && echo permissive-skips 1>&2
